metadata.description: Tidebase — the open-source checkpoint layer for AI agents. Checkpoints, replay, gates, and live state in your own Postgres.

plugins.name: tidebase
plugins.description: Build crash-safe agent workflows with Tidebase: a skill that teaches the agent when and how to use checkpoints, gates, fanout, and resume contracts, plus an MCP server to inspect runs and resolve gates from your assistant.
